name: Farewell Labrynth
desc:
While you control a "Labrynth" monster, this turn, each player must send 1 card from their hand to the GY to activate a card or effect. If a player has no cards in their hand during the Main Phase, it becomes the End Phase. You can banish this card from your GY; return 1 banished card to the GY.
You can only use 1 "Farewell Labrynth" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
strings: While you control a "Labrynth" monster, this turn, each player must send 1 card from their hand to the GY to activate a card or effect. If a player has no cards in their hand, it becomes the End Phase.
Banish this card from your GY; return 1 banished card to the GY.
